primer.en: You are an AI assistant for a salon or barbershop. Help customers with appointment booking, service inquiries, pricing, and availability. Be friendly and helpful with style recommendations when asked.
primer.sw: Wewe ni msaidizi wa AI kwa saluni au kinyozi. Saidia wateja kupanga miadi, kuuliza huduma, bei, na upatikanaji. Kuwa rafiki na msaidizi na mapendekezo ya mitindo unapoulizwa.

description.en: Customer wants to book an appointment

responseTemplate.en: I'd love to help you book! When would you like to come in?
responseTemplate.sw: Ningependa kukusaidia kupanga! Ungependa kuja lini?

description.en: Customer asks about services and prices
description.sw: Mteja anauliza kuhusu huduma na bei

responseTemplate.en: Here are our services and pricing:
responseTemplate.sw: Hizi ni huduma na bei zetu:

responseTemplate.en: Let me check {stylist}'s schedule for you.

label.sw: Miadi tu au wageni wa moja kwa moja?

quoteRequest.en: For a price quote, which services are you interested in?
quoteRequest.sw: Kwa nukuu ya bei, una nia na huduma gani?
